title: Data & Analytics On-Chain
subtitle: Reading the Blockchain Like a Database
description: Query, analyze, and visualize on-chain data. Learn to use Dune, The Graph, and direct RPC calls to extract insights from smart contract events and state.

lessons.title: Reading Blockchain Data
lessons.description: Blocks, transactions, logs, and events — the raw data layer of EVM chains.
lessons.topics: Blocks, Transactions, Logs, Events, ABI decoding

lessons.title: Dune Analytics
lessons.description: Writing SQL queries against on-chain data with Dune.

lessons.title: The Graph Protocol
lessons.description: Indexing smart contract data with subgraphs for fast querying.

lessons.title: Direct RPC Queries
lessons.description: Using eth_call, eth_getLogs, and batch requests for custom data extraction.

lessons.title: Token Analytics
lessons.description: Tracking transfers, holders, volume, and liquidity for ERC-20 tokens.
lessons.topics: Transfer events, Holder counts, Volume tracking, Pool analytics

lessons.title: Building Dashboards
lessons.description: Create real-time dashboards for protocol metrics using on-chain data.
lessons.topics: Dashboard design, Real-time data, Visualization, Alerting
